p2p_enrich.notes: Enhanced p2p enrichment with 9 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates. CI commands discovered: pre-commit run --all-files (ruff, check-yaml, trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer), pytest -m '(not slow or ci) and not {EXCLUDE_BACKEND}' tests/test_*.py tests/experimental/, py_compile, wheel build verification. Tests added: test_repo_test_classes_follow_naming (ruff class naming), test_repo_no_bare_excepts (E722), test_repo_yaml_files_valid (check-yaml), test_repo_pyproject_toml_valid (toml syntax), test_repo_trailing_whitespace (pre-commit hook), test_repo_end_of_file_newline (pre-commit hook), test_repo_no_tabs (W191), test_repo_py_compile (bytecode validation), test_repo_no_merge_conflict_markers (git artifacts). Docker environment is minimal (no pytest/ruff installed) so tests use AST/file analysis via subprocess.

validate.notes: Docker build successful. NOP test: reward=0 (7 fail-to-pass tests correctly failed). Gold test: reward=1 (all 24 tests passed). Rubric judge returned 0.5 due to missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (infrastructure limitation, not task issue).
